title: will they show Unit 1 without the helmet in movie 3 or 4
display_title: will they show Unit 1 without the helmet in movie 3 or 4
wikitext:
[]: will they show Unit-1 without the helmet in movie 3 or 4?             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest. » Fri Jan 15, 2010 11:36 pm I was looking at the old Neon genesis evangelion series and at the end of episode 2 it shows unit 1 without the helmet (remember a big grey thing with a red mouth and green eye?) they didnt show it in evangelion 1.0 so im wondering if they will in 3.0 or 4.0?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Jan 15, 2010 11:48 pm You do realize no one here is on production staff nor can anyone predict the future right? There is however a short glimpse of her face in 1.0 when the refit the armor after the initial Ramiel encounter.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:09 am You also have to realize that 3.0 and Final wont be following the TV series which was evident with 2.0.Final epsecially since that's an all new movie.

[]:             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest. » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:14 am Okay well i thank u for that i didnt catch that in 1.0 but i will how ever go back and check that out becuase im dieing to see a updated animation of unit-1 under the helmet

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 16, 2010 5:21 am Not really updated; looks basically the same as in episode 20. (Any pigmentation changes are obscured by the combination of bandages and coolant.)

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Jan 16, 2010 10:46 am Reichu wrote: Not really updated; looks basically the same as in episode 20. (Any pigmentation changes are obscured by the combination of bandages and coolant.)

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:10 am I would like to know what is going to happen to Shinji in 3.0. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Jan 16, 2010 3:46 pm Well she'd definantly look different,in 1.0 after Shinjis brilliant idea of grabbing Shamsham's Wacky Waving Tentacles of Death, Im pretty sure it was shown that her skin was a very pale colour as supposed to brown. It'd be interesting to see her face.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Sun Jan 17, 2010 11:40 am SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Jan 17, 2010 1:33 pm Ok.......are you claiming to be on the production team now?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Jan 17, 2010 1:48 pm He was joking... i guess?

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sun Jan 17, 2010 7:04 pm konfunoodle wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Sun Jan 17, 2010 8:04 pm konfunoodle wrote: SPOILER: Show
